appraisal_events.evidence: « ne savait jamais ... de quel ton ... il ajoutait ... un sourire conditionnel et provisoire ... on y voyait flotter perpétuellement une incertitude »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator’s detailed portrait highlights Cottard’s perpetual social uncertainty and defensive smiling, lowering his local standing as inept and timid in salons and in life.

status_effects.explanation: He is depicted as socially inept and unsure, which diminishes his local appraisal.
